title: calliopsis nudata
intro: Calliopsis nudata, also known as the naked coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its small yellow or orange flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. Some of the reported health benefits of Calliopsis nudata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
